trans-unit.source: The last modules introduced the operations and tools necessary to perform geographic data analysis within QGIS. This module takes the knowledge from the previous modules and applies them to create an understanding of spatial analysis. The first chapter discusses what spatial analysis means, and how it can help us understand phenomenons and answer questions. In this chapter, basic analysis methods, such as basic statistics, buffer analysis, Density maps, or interpolation, are explained. The second chapter focuses more in depth at data analysis methods within the humanitarian sector.
trans-unit.target: The last modules introduced the operations and tools necessary to perform geographic data analysis within QGIS. This module takes the knowledge from the previous modules and applies them to create an understanding of spatial analysis. The first chapter discusses what spatial analysis means, and how it can help us understand phenomenons and answer questions. In this chapter, basic analysis methods, such as basic statistics, buffer analysis, Density maps, or interpolation, are explained. The second chapter focuses more in depth at data analysis methods within the humanitarian sector.

trans-unit.source: Know what can be understood as spatial analysis; Know how to perform a buffer analysis; Know how to create a heatmap; Know how to gain information by joining attributes; Know how to select locations according to a set of criteria; Know how to interpolate.
trans-unit.target: Know what can be understood as spatial analysis; Know how to perform a buffer analysis; Know how to create a heatmap; Know how to gain information by joining attributes; Know how to select locations according to a set of criteria; Know how to interpolate.

trans-unit.source: Know common data analysis methods in humanitarian Work
trans-unit.target: Know common data analysis methods in humanitarian Work

trans-unit.source: Here you can find the exercises for module 6.
trans-unit.target: Here you can find the exercises for module 6.
